notes: Dashboard Net Worth hero card now shows a second big value beside net worth: Liquidity. Layout is side-by-side (two columns within the same feature card, divided by a rule), collapsing to stacked below 520px. The liquidity figure reuses the same definition as the Net Worth page / Liquidity health (liquid investments + cash), and its cash component uses the SAME chain-adjusted value (projectSavingsChain via _dashCashChain) that already feeds the hero net worth and the composition bar, so the card is internally consistent (liquidity equals the liquid segments shown in the bar). A dynamic sub-label lists exactly which holdings are counted, read from state at render time (each investment flagged liquid, plus 'Cash & Savings' when present), so it stays accurate if an instrument's liquid flag is later toggled; if nothing is flagged liquid it reads 'no liquid assets flagged'. Scope is display-only: no projection, net-worth, savings-chain or retirement math changed. NOTE: the Liquidity-health card lower on the Dashboard computes its liquid figure from p.cashSeries rather than the chain-adjusted cash; if that card and this new hero value ever differ slightly, that difference is the cause and can be unified in a later build. KNOWN ITEM (still deferred): current-month savings forecast uses the engine's PLANNED surplus, so a large current-month expense does not yet re-forecast future savings; touches projectSavingsChain and needs double-count verification. Reusable SELF_TEST.js and PROPAGATION_TEST_{1,2,3}.js remain valid.
